titles.text: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 37 - The Illust Puzzle & Slide Puzzle
Simple 1500シリーズ Vol.37 The イラストパズル＆スライドパズル

roms.name: Simple 1500 Series Vol. 37 - The Illust Puzzle & Slide Puzzle (Japan)

descriptions.text: Big collection of illustration and slide puzzles for the player to choose and solve. Up to 2 players to play at the same time. There are more than 500 illustration puzzles and more than 100 slide puzzles.
